h0bc00a24ga735g4227gb5ccgb7d4a7d2565f: *Your skull throbs, your muscles ache. Memories of the last day swim through your head before taking form.*
hca866d01g5ac0g44f9g848fg03f02c3e038a: Meditate on the words of your Queen. Through them, you will find calm.
heb17d373gf0cfg4f82g85b3gb09fd3d2d8f6: 'Vlaakith'ka sivim hrath krash'ht.' Only in Vlaakith may we find light.
he4c250dbgc507g4d22gac91ga65d86e2d44e: *The world around you comes into focus. Whatever this place, you know Vlaakith's protocol: you must locate a githyanki crèche.*
h3a34b412gcfbeg498fgb953g3e954774b6c4: *It is only a matter of days before tentacles split your lips, and your skin turns to gore.*
hbb9022c3g1a57g4e85gb3acgf7d2df2dd253: *At a crèche, you will find your kin. The tadpole will be removed, and you will be purified.*
h5b64cf2cgdc54g4c83g9496g111088466aaf: Summon your resolve. The ghaik tadpole will not be the end of you.
h28a2737dgd963g45ffgb50ag6d90f90c00cb: *The pain brings the world into focus. Whatever this place, You know Vlaakith's protocol: you must locate a githyanki crèche.*
h1c032426g9fceg4586g8708ged2a97947efc: Rub your forehead. Can you feel the tadpole, wriggling inside?
hf8e1c4bcgcafag4c87g94bbg7a48bc3cfbb1: *Inside you, an atrocity is growing - feeding on you, becoming you.*
hae42d5a7gf70ag419fga75ag007f73eb2bdb: *It's only a matter of days before tentacles split your lips, and your skin turns to gore.*
he210194egfe2bg45acg8df1ga7577b41f8d8: *If you want a cure, you must follow protocol: locate a githyanki crèche.*
h2ce38e40gec1dg405eg8a89geab39e0543a7: *There, you will find your kin. The tadpole will be removed, and you will be purified.*
heaffd7ffg1508g4bccgbd20g22d3e59e0130: Brush off the pain - there is no time to waste.
h1a43c39fg5223g40aag8f0dg2209c2ba4b5c: *The pain deepens as you take in the world around you.*
h3a7feeefg3658g41e3g8b91g6a275a4690d9: *Whatever this place, you know Vlaakith's protocol: You must locate a githyanki crèche.*
